'''zhomakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhegmatogenous|rhegmatogenous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhegmatogenous|rhegmatogenous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhomakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomakithi|zhomakithi]] || [[word:zhomakiji|zhomakiji]] || [[word:zhomakishi|zhomakishi]] || [[word:zhomakiki|zhomakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomakuthuthu|zhomakuthuthu]] || [[word:zhomakujuju|zhomakujuju]] || [[word:zhomakushushu|zhomakushushu]] || [[word:zhomakukuku|zhomakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomakuthu|zhomakuthu]] || [[word:zhomakuju|zhomakuju]] || [[word:zhomakushu|zhomakushu]] || [[word:zhomakuku|zhomakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomakufthuf|zhomakufthuf]] || [[word:zhomakufjuf|zhomakufjuf]] || [[word:zhomakufshuf|zhomakufshuf]] || [[word:zhomakufkuf|zhomakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomakethe|zhomakethe]] || [[word:zhomakeje|zhomakeje]] || [[word:zhomakeshe|zhomakeshe]] || [[word:zhomakeke|zhomakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomakothotho|zhomakothotho]] || [[word:zhomakojojo|zhomakojojo]] || [[word:zhomakoshosho|zhomakoshosho]] || [[word:zhomakokoko|zhomakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomakotho|zhomakotho]] || [[word:zhomakojo|zhomakojo]] || [[word:zhomakosho|zhomakosho]] || [[word:zhomakoko|zhomakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomakofthof|zhomakofthof]] || [[word:zhomakofjof|zhomakofjof]] || [[word:zhomakofshof|zhomakofshof]] || [[word:zhomakofkof|zhomakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomakïfthïf|zhomakïfthïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfjïf|zhomakïfjïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfshïf|zhomakïfshïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfkïf|zhomakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomakïfthïfthïf|zhomakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfjïfjïf|zhomakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfshïfshïf|zhomakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfkïfkïf|zhomakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomakïfthïf|zhomakïfthïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfjïf|zhomakïfjïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfshïf|zhomakïfshïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfkïf|zhomakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomakïfthïf|zhomakïfthïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfjïf|zhomakïfjïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfshïf|zhomakïfshïf]] || [[word:zhomakïfkïf|zhomakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhomakæthæ|zhomakæthæ]] || [[word:zhomakæjæ|zhomakæjæ]] || [[word:zhomakæshæ|zhomakæshæ]] || [[word:zhomakækæ|zhomakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhomakathatha|zhomakathatha]] || [[word:zhomakajaja|zhomakajaja]] || [[word:zhomakashasha|zhomakashasha]] || [[word:zhomakakaka|zhomakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhomakatha|zhomakatha]] || [[word:zhomakaja|zhomakaja]] || [[word:zhomakasha|zhomakasha]] || [[word:zhomakaka|zhomakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhomakafthaf|zhomakafthaf]] || [[word:zhomakafjaf|zhomakafjaf]] || [[word:zhomakafshaf|zhomakafshaf]] || [[word:zhomakafkaf|zhomakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhomakasha|zhomakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhomakshësha|zhomakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhomakrosha|zhomakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhomakmusha|zhomakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhomakyasha|zhomakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhomaknkshësha|gozhomaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhomaknkrosha|gozhomaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhomaknkmusha|gozhomaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhomaknkyasha|gozhomaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhomamakasha|zhomamakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhomamakshësha|zhomamakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhomamakrosha|zhomamakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhomamakmusha|zhomamakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhomamakyasha|zhomamakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhomamaknkshësha|gozhomamaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhomamaknkrosha|gozhomamaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhomamaknkmusha|gozhomamaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhomamaknkyasha|gozhomamaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhemækasha|zhemækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhemækshësha|zhemækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhemækrosha|zhemækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhemækmusha|zhemækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhemækyasha|zhemækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhemæknkshësha|gozhemæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhemæknkrosha|gozhemæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhemæknkmusha|gozhemæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhemæknkyasha|gozhemæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhomfakasha|zhomfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhomfakshësha|zhomfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhomfakrosha|zhomfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhomfakmusha|zhomfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhomfakyasha|zhomfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhomfaknkshësha|gozhomfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhomfaknkrosha|gozhomfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhomfaknkmusha|gozhomfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhomfaknkyasha|gozhomfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
